review_text: App crashes every single time I try to open my settings. Completely unusable.
Best app I've used in years. Simple, fast, exactly what I needed.
It's OK I guess. Nothing special but it works.
Great, another crash. Love it. Really great job guys.
The navigation is super confusing. I can never find what I'm looking for.
Takes about 30 seconds to load anything. Way too slow.
Would be amazing if you could add PDF export. That would make it perfect.
$15/month for this? Are you kidding me? Way overpriced.
Took me 20 minutes just to create my first project. No tutorial, no guide, nothing.
First review on the App Store lol. Just downloaded it.
